rows.description: Acconnt Dinnr

rows.description: To Mr Richmonds Bill for 5s of Oct last past

rows.description: For wood in ye Churchyard at payinge a fine

rows.description: To ye Cook for Xmas, Newyear & twelfe days gaudys
